tasks.label: 批量编译PySide6 UI文件
args: Get-ChildItem -Path '${workspaceFolder}\src\ui' -Recurse -Filter *.ui | ForEach-Object { $outputPath = Join-Path -Path $_.DirectoryName -ChildPath "ui_$($_.BaseName).py"; & 'E:/anaconda3/envs/env_python310/Scripts/pyside6-uic.exe' $_.FullName -o $outputPath --from-imports; Write-Host "✅ 编译完成: $outputPath" }
tasks.detail: 递归编译src/ui下所有（含子文件夹）的.ui文件为ui_xxx.py
